title: Wicked Witch of the West
description: Master forbidden spells, travel through dimensions, and claim your magical destiny...
body:
# 🧙‍♀️ Wicked Witch of the West

**Version:** 5.0 (Current release, not retro-compatible)  
**Minecraft:** 1.21.10  

Master forbidden spells, travel through dimensions 🌌, and claim your magical destiny... ✨  

---

## ⚙️ How It Works

- 🔮 Craft the **pendant**.  
- ✋ Place it in your **left hand**. (The item in your inventory will not be erased.)  
- 🛡️ The item will not be lost when activating the pendant.  

---

## 📈 Progression System

Progression is based on **XP levels** 🟢 and the **number of witches you kill** ⚔️ after becoming one.  
- ⬆️ The more XP you collect, the more spells you unlock.  
- 📖 Once unlocked, spells remain permanent (even if you die 💀 and lose XP).  

### 🪄 Spells Unlocked via XP

| Level | Spell |
|-------|--------|
| 15 | 🧹 Magic Broom |
| 20 | 🌀 Teleportation Spell (Poofing) |
| 30 | ⛓️ Immobilisation Spell (Binding Spell)|
| 40 | 🛡️ Shield Spell |

---

## 🧙 Witch Progression System

You start as a **Witch**. 🕸️  
Each new level increases:  
- ✨ **Magic energy** (+100 per level)  
- 💥 **Magic blast damage**  
- 📜 **Spells in your spellbook**  

To level up: **Kill 10 witches** ☠️.  

| 🔢 Level | 🧙 Title        |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Witch 🧙‍♀️      |
| 2        | Mystic Witch 🔮 |
| 3        | Occult Witch 🌑 |
| 4        | Dark Witch 🦇   |
| 5        | Wicked Witch 👑 |

---

## 📚 Spells & Spellbook

### 🔮 Wicked Witch’s Pendant Spells
- **Magic Blast** – 💥 Deals damage + Weakness (10s) [5 energy]  
- **Poofing (Teleportation)** – 🌀Right click to use, Optionnal: Sneak to teleport other entities [10 energy]  
- **Binding Spell** – ⛓️ Immobilisation spell [15 energy]  
- **Magic Broom / Shield** – 🧹 Flying broom or 🛡️ shield mode  

---

### 📖 Spellbook by Witch Level

#### 🧙 Witch
- **Locator Spell** – 📡 Locate entities in a 150-block radius  
- **Dispel** – 💨 Clears potion effects in a 5-block radius  
- **Barrier Spell** – 🧱 Creates a magic wall  

#### 🔮 Mystic Witch
- **Protection Spell** – 🛡️ Resistance, 🔥 Fire Resistance, 🪂 Slow Falling (60s, 5-block radius)  
- **Healing Spell** – ❤️ Regeneration VI (30s, 5-block radius)  
- **Astral Projection** 🌠  

#### 🌑 Occult Witch
- **Recall Spell** – 📍 Set a teleport recall point  
- **Ghost Walk** – 👻 Become a ghost temporarily  
- **Size Spell** – 📏 Modify your own size  

#### 🦇 Dark Witch
- **Aura Explosion** – 💥 Deal area damage (10-block radius)  
- **HexBind** – 🔮 Enchant any item  

#### 👑 Wicked Witch
- **Heart Ripping** – ❤️‍🔥 Rip and use hearts (place in slot 9 to immobilize or highlight)  
- **Size Curse** – 📏 Modify nearby entities’ size (tiny/giant/normal, 3-block radius)  

---

## 🪄 Wicked Witch’s Wand

Wield the **Wicked Witch’s Wand**, unlockable via a **Scroll spell**, and dropped by specific mobs.

### Spells
- **Glamour Spell** ✨  
  - Drop one item and hold another in your off-hand to change the ground item’s appearance.  
  - Remove glamour by dropping into water.  
  - *Dropped by:* Illusioner (summon via Witchlight Spell)

- **Spatial Hex** 🌪️ – Swap position with a nearby entity *(Dropped by Evoker)*  
- **Disarm Spell** ⚔️ – Take your opponent’s weapon *(Dropped by Warden)*  
- **Steelfall Hex** 🛡️ – Drop the opponent’s armor *(Dropped by Allay)*  

---

## ✨ New Enchantments

| Enchantment | Effect | Slot |
|--------------|---------|------|
| **Mermaid Blessing** | Live underwater like a mermaid | Legs / Feet |
| **Heart Protection** | Prevents your heart from being ripped | Chest |
| **MoonWoven** | Stronger protection at night 🌙, weaker at day ☀️ | Any |
| **Giant Charm** | Become larger | Head |
| **Shrink Charm** | Become smaller | Head |

---

## 🏰 Wicked Witch’s Mansion  
*(Structure by MrMattRanger)*

- Obtainable after becoming the **Wicked Witch**  
- Grants access to a **pocket dimension** where the mansion resides  
- **Right-click** to enter, **right-click again** to return  
- Lost your token? 🔮 Recraft it in the cauldron  

---

## 🌌 Wand of Realms

- Allows **dimension travel** (vanilla or modded)  
- Requires a **Dimensional Crystal** in your off-hand to function  
- **Usable by anyone**

### Dimensional Crystal
- Craftable in the cauldron  
- **Right-click** to save a teleport position for the Wand of Realms  

---

## 💔 Heart Ripping

- Causes an entity to **glow** ✨ and become **immobilized**  
- Place the heart in the **last hotbar slot** to activate  
- Summon entities through a **Heart Summoning Spell** in the cauldron  

---

## 👠 Silver Slippers

- Travel across **dimensions** 🌍🔥🌑 (Overworld, Nether, End)  
- If **House Spell 🏠** is active, teleport to your house  

### 🛠️ Upgrades
- **Default:** Overworld + House  
- **Nether Upgrade 🔥**  
- **End Upgrade 🌑**  

### 👥 Companion Amulet
- Allows nearby players (within 3 blocks) to travel together  

---

## 🏠 House Spell

- Cast the spell with it in hand and **right-click** 🖱️  
- Defines your **House** location (works in custom dimensions)  
- Travel there with the Silver Slippers 👠  

---

## 🧪 Cauldron Spells

Drop ingredients into a **water cauldron** 💧  
- Active in a **14-block radius**  
- Add **Dragon’s Breath** 🐉 to increase range  
- Drop **Gunpowder 💣** or break the cauldron to cancel  

Use `/trigger cauld_comp` to view all recipes.

### 🍵 Example Spells
- 💀 **Annihilation Spell** – Kill all hostile entities  
- ☠️ **Maleficia Maxima** – Apply debuffs: Wither, Fatigue, Hunger, etc.  
- 🛡️ **Protection Spell** – Grants invincibility to the Witch and curses intruders  
- 🏴 **Wicked Banner** – Cosmetic craft  
- 🐈 **Summon Familiar (Salem)** – A black cat 🐾 (50 HP) granting Resistance + Luck  
- 🍏 **Enchant Golden Apple** – Converts a golden apple into enchanted one (costs 5 magic)  
- 🔥 **Nether Upgrade** – Enables Nether travel for Silver Slippers  
- 🌑 **End Upgrade** – Enables End travel for Silver Slippers  
- 🔔 **Witch Light** – Summons random witches (and possibly Evokers/Illusioners)  

---

## 🪞 Magic Mirror

- Teleports you between mirrors (works across dimensions)  
- **Right-click** to place a mirror  
- If no exit is set, teleports to your last used mirror  
- **Remove** a mirror with Redstone Dust  
- **Lock:** Drop pendant into mirror  
- **Unlock:** Glowstone ✨ (offhand) + Pendant (main hand) → Right-click  

---

## ⚒️ Craft Commands

<details>
<summary>📦 Loot Commands</summary>

```
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/witch_pendant
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/silver_slippers
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/the_grimmerie
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/house
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/companion
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/magic_mirror_entry
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/magic_wand
/loot give @s loot wicked:item/wand
```
</details>


## 🔄 Conformation

There are 2 conformations to switch between the 🧹 Magic broom mode or the 🛡️ shield spell.  
If you drop the Magic broom, it will switch between the two modes.  

- **Conformation 1** : 🧹 Magic broom – sneak & hold to fly  
- **Conformation 2** : 🛡️ Shield spell – sneak & hold broom to cast shield (can also hurt mobs ⚔️)  


## ℹ️ Informations

📜 The datapack includes new recipes 🍲, new advancements ⭐, and new loottables.  
To uninstall the datapack run:  


```
/function wicked:uninstall
```
